result:
Here's the complete map of payment processing and billing logic in the codebase:

---

## Payment Gateway Integrations (app-level classes)

| File | Class/Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/razorPay.php` | Razorpay — invoice creation, API tracking |
| `app/paytm.php` | Paytm — DQR, transactions, refunds |
| `app/PayPhiWorldLine.php` | WorldLine/PayPhi — device config, invoices, webhooks |
| `app/PineLabs.php` | PineLabs — Plural tokens, payment links, orders, invoices |
| `app/Billme.php` | Billme/Razorpay invoice management |
| `app/PaytmChecksum.php`, `app/PaytmCloudChecksum.php` | Paytm checksum utilities |

## Controllers

| File | Key Methods |
|---|---|
| `app/Http/Controllers/appController.php` | `savePaymentInfo()`, `initiateRazorpayPayment()`, `checkRazorpayPaymentStatus()`, `refundRazorpayPayment()`, `initiatePaytmPayment()`, `checkPaytmPaymentStatus()`, `refundPaytmPayment()`, `initiateSnapmintPayment()`, `generatePluralPaymentLink()`, `recordBijlipayPaymentIntent()`, `fetchTenderDeclarationTransaction()`, `fetchBankTransactions()`, `insertDeviceSettlementLog()` |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/appController.php` | `savePaymentInfo()` (v2) |
| `app/Http/Controllers/BillingWeb.php` | Billing web interface |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/BillingWeb.php` | V2 billing web |
| `app/Http/Controllers/PayPhiController.php` | `webHookCallback()` — WorldLine webhook handler |
| `app/Http/Controllers/v2/OrderController.php` | Invoice/payment endpoints |

## Services

| File | Key Methods |
|---|---|
| `app/Services/PaymentMappingService.php` | `copyPaymentMappings()`, `getStorePaymentMappings()` |
| `app/Services/InvoiceNumberService.php` | `generateInvoiceNumber()` — race-condition-safe sequential numbering |

## Jobs (async processing)

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/Jobs/CaptureRazorpayPaymentsJob.php` | Capture pending Razorpay payments |
| `app/Jobs/CreateRazorpayInvoice.php` | Async Razorpay invoice creation |
| `app/Jobs/EcomVoidOrderPaymentRefundJob.php` | Ecommerce order refunds |
| `app/Jobs/EcomPendingPaymentJob.php` | Pending ecommerce payments |
| `app/Jobs/ExpireOrderPaymentRefundJob.php` | Expired order refunds |
| `app/Jobs/TMCPaymentJob.php` | TMC payment processing |
| `app/Jobs/PinelabsDigitalInvoiceJob.php` | PineLabs digital invoices |
| `app/Jobs/SendInvoiceJob.php` | Invoice delivery |
| `app/Jobs/thirdPartyInvoiceGenerateJob.php` | Third-party invoicing |
| `app/Jobs/UnicommerceCreateInvoiceJob.php` | Unicommerce invoices |
| `app/Jobs/ZOHOCreataeInvoiceJob.php` | ZOHO invoices |
| `app/Jobs/vendorBillJob.php` | Vendor bill processing |
| `app/Jobs/beepkartUpdatePaymentJob.php` | Beepkart payment updates |
| `app/Jobs/AutomateLicensePaymentJob.php` | License payment automation |
| `app/Jobs/PBMChallanPaymentJob.php` | Municipal payments |
| `app/Jobs/CustomerKhataTransactionsJob.php` | Khata (credit ledger) transactions |

## Console Commands

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/Console/Commands/captureRazorpayPayments.php` | Capture pending Razorpay payments (cron) |
| `app/Console/Commands/integrationBilling.php` | Integration billing |
| `app/Console/Commands/postAdvancePaymentDLF.php` | DLF advance payments |
| `app/Console/Commands/checkFailedUPPCLPayment.php` | UPPCL payment validation |
| `app/Console/Commands/thirdPartyInvoiceGeneration.php` | Third-party invoice gen |

## Models / Domain Classes

| File | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/Order.php` | Main order model (~1.5MB) — payment integration embedded |
| `app/OnlineOrder.php` | Online order with payment handling |
| `app/CashManagement.php` | Cash and payment management |
| `app/Receipts.php` | Payment receipts |
| `app/vendorBill.php` | Vendor bill management |
| `app/NectorInvoice.php` | Nector invoice handling |

## Middleware

- `app/Http/Middleware/PayPhiMiddleware.php` — WorldLine/PayPhi webhook verification

## Key Database Tables (multi-tenant: `chain{ID}_`)

`orderPayments`, `invoicePayments`, `paymentIntentStatus`, `thirdPartyPaymentIntent`, `invoiceSequence`, `invoiceSummary`, `invoiceDetail`, `bankingSummary`, `transactionTenderDeclaration`, `vendorBillPayments`, `purchaseOrderPayments`, `creditPaymentDetail`, `creditPaymentSummary`, `deviceOrderSettlementLogs`, `PIPayments`

## Supported Gateways

**Razorpay**, **Paytm**, **PineLabs/Plural**, **PayPal** (via Omnipay), **WorldLine/PayPhi**, **Snapmint**, **Bijlipay**, **UTAP** — with full flows for initiation, status checks, refunds, and settlement.
